title: X Bubble Sets
description: Funny colored bubbles. Pop them! In the game X-Bubble Sets, you will need to launch bubbles and fall into piles with the same colors. Pop all the bubbles, earn points and complete the levels.
instructions: Aim and tap to launch the bubble in the direction of pressing If they get into one-color bubbles they will burst if there are 3 or more of them Bubbles that remain hanging in the air will also burst
